case_title: XIAO WEN JIANG VS. ELEONORA TROTTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2020 BY GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF XIAO WEN JIANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELEONORA TROTTA IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PARTIES PARTCIPATES IN MEDIATION. AGREEMENT COULD NOT BE REACHED. TRIAL IS HELD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S CELL PHONE PICTURES OF VEHICLE DAMAGE ARE REVEIWED BY COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TROTTA, ELEONORA
